sizing_rule.note: Position units inversely scaled to 20-day average daily range volatility. Baseline: $8,000 equity per 1 unit at median volatility. Scaling exponent 0.8 applied. Maximum drawdown exposure capped at 50% across volatility regimes.

source_rule_text: Adjust position size inversely to the daily volatility of the instrument being traded, using a baseline unit size tied to account equity such that maximum drawdown exposure remains constant across different volatility regimes.
